lede: A look at March 23 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Anna Hall (heptathlete) and Jason Kenny, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2026 Colombian Air Force Lockheed C-130 crash
events.desc: An Aerospace Force Lockheed C-130 crashes during take-off in Puerto Leguízamo, Columbia, killing 70 people.

events.title: 2021 Suez Canal obstruction
events.desc: A container ship runs aground and obstructs the Suez Canal for six days.

events.title: Aeroflot Flight 593
events.desc: Aeroflot Flight 593 crashes into the Kuznetsk Alatau mountain, Kemerovo Oblast, Russia, killing 75.

events.title: Battle of Cuito Cuanavale
events.desc: Angolan and Cuban forces defeat South Africa in the Battle of Cuito Cuanavale.

events.title: Pakistan
events.desc: Pakistan becomes the first Islamic republic in the world. This date is now celebrated as Republic Day in Pakistan.

events.title: Bhagat Singh
events.desc: Bhagat Singh, Shivaram Rajguru and Sukhdev Thapar are hanged for the killing of a deputy superintendent of police during the Indian independence movement.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: The First Battle of Kernstown, Virginia, marks the start of Stonewall Jackson's Valley Campaign. Although a Confederate defeat, the engagement distracts Federal efforts to capture Richmond.

events.title: 1839 Ava earthquake
events.desc: A massive earthquake destroys the former capital Inwa of the Konbaung dynasty, present-day Myanmar.

events.title: Trần dynasty
events.desc: The Trần dynasty of Vietnam is deposed, after one hundred and seventy-five years of rule, by Hồ Quý Ly, a court official.

events.title: Muhammad
events.desc: The Muslim army under Muhammad suffers a defeat against the Quraysh in the battle of Uhud.

births.name: Hermann Staudinger
births.line: German chemist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate (died 1965)

deaths.text: Jim Duffy (animator), American animator, director, and producer
Luis María Argaña, Paraguayan judge and politician, Vice President of Paraguay
Mae Murray, American actress, dancer, producer, and screenwriter
Luís António Verney, Portuguese philosopher and pedagogue

observances.text: Christian feast day: Gregory the Illuminator (Episcopal Church)
Christian feast day: Rafqa Pietra Choboq Ar-Rayès (Maronite Church)
Christian feast day: Victorian, Frumentius and Companions
